_description: Dirty Page tracking for Android-SW-Owner Skill Set. A 'dirty' skill requires content refresh due to AOSP version changes or path structure updates.
_research_note: 2026-04-08 Phase 4.5: A15 validation pass complete. All skills updated from A14 to A15 baseline. Prior A16 research notes (HS-023..HS-030) remain valid for future A16 pass.

L2-build-system-expert._steward_note: A15: sandboxed genrules, Python 2 removed, sysprop ref change, depfile removal, module name validation. See HS-031.

L2-security-selinux-expert._steward_note: A15: signature permission allowlist, private space SELinux domains, FBE dusize_4k. See HS-031.

L2-hal-vendor-interface-expert._steward_note: A15: VNDK deprecated, AIDL mandatory for new HALs, Health HAL 3.0, Thermal HAL 2.0. See HS-031.

L2-framework-services-expert._steward_note: A15: FGS restrictions from BOOT_COMPLETED, mediaProcessing FGS type, soft restart deprecated. See HS-032.

L2-init-boot-sequence-expert._steward_note: A15: Virtual A/B v3, 16KB page size boot, soft restart deprecated. See HS-032.

L2-version-migration-expert._steward_note: A15: baseline updated; migration table verified. 16KB mandatory deadline May 2026.

L2-multimedia-audio-expert._steward_note: A15: Low Light Boost, camera feature combo API, head tracking LE Audio, RoI encoding, AIDL CAP gap. See HS-032.

L2-connectivity-network-expert._steward_note: A15: APF v6, 802.11az Wi-Fi RTT, proprietary NCI commands. See HS-032.

L2-kernel-gki-expert._steward_note: A15: GKI android15-6.6 (Linux 6.6 LTS), KMI break from A14, 16KB page GKI builds. See HS-031.

L2-bootloader-lk-expert._steward_note: A15: 16KB page size boot, ro.boot.hardware.cpu.pagesize, Virtual A/B v3. See HS-032.

L2-trusted-firmware-atf-expert._steward_note: A15: AVF device assignment (experimental), no direct ATF AOSP API changes.

L2-virtualization-pkvm-expert._steward_note: Already validated at A15. Updatable VMs, remote attestation, device assignment (experimental).

L3-TEMPLATE._note: Template skill for L3 OEM/SoC extensions. Not a real skill — used as a copy source.
